title: 人像写实摄影图
prompt: A striking black and white close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="handsome young Asian man"} with {argument name="hair style" default="messy wet hair sticking to his forehead"}. His face and neck are glistening, covered in highly detailed {argument name="skin texture detail" default="water droplets and sweat"}. He has an intense, melancholic gaze directed off-camera to the left. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing his sharp jawline, full lips, and specular highlights on the wet skin against a {argument name="background" default="pitch-black background"}. Shot in a photorealistic, high-fashion editorial style with cinematic chiaroscuro.
